description: Bill of divorce (get). Location: Fustat. Dated: Monday, 21 Sivan 1412 Seleucid, which is 1101 CE. Husband: ʿOvadya b. Yeshula ha-Kohen. Wife: Ghāliya bt. Hānī. Witnessed by the cantor Hillel b. ʿEli (compare T-S 10J2.9), and ʿUlla b. Yosef ha-Levi. No documentation of receipt on verso. (Information from CUDL)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בארמית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
